name: When Moonlight Shines in the Forest
description: Following the events of the Dim Forest, Qiaomu and Hoohoo decided to stay around the Violet Banyan. They seem particularly interested in the moons of the Violet Banyan.

name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Cat's Language
description: A strange researcher is trying to talk to cats through a special function of her Terminal...

name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Rabbit's Language
description: You meet Xuanyin again. This time, she is spying on a Green Rabbit...

name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Dog's Language
description: You meet Xuanyin again, who is having fun with some puppies...

name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Fish's Language
description: You meet Xuanyin again. This time, she is spying on the Tetra...

name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Frog's Language
description: You meet Xuanyin again, while the sounds of frog surround you...

name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Lizard's Language
description: You meet Xuanyin again, who was buried in thoughts...

name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Bird's Language
description: You meet Xuanyin again. This time, she is trying to talk to a Gray Crested Gull...

name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Bird's Language - Sequel
description: You meet Xuanyin again. This time, she is observing the doves on the rooftop...

name: Journal of Jinzhou: Vo.1
description: You see two engaging in a heated discussion on the journal. Go and check what has happened.

name: Journal of Jinzhou: Vol.2
description: The upcoming issue of the journal is in progress. Go and check out the featured content.

name: Honorary Chef: Taste of Memories
description: You see Panhua comforting a crying girl. Maybe go up and ask what happened...

name: Restart the radar
description: The Jinzhou military wants to restart the radar at Desorock Highland, but the engineer in charge has yet to show up...

name: Wait for Godo
description: Take Midnight Rangers Godo's place on guard duty

name: The Past is the Future: Introduction
description: The girl behind the theater seems to have trouble looking for the gift her sister left her. Go and learn about the situation.

name: The Fabled Magnetic Cube Mechanics - I
description: The nagging engineer Mizhi always mentions hearing a mysterious sound calling him...

name: Tacet Discord Hunter
description: Find the Resonator who once proclaimed to be "Tacet Discord Hunter" to obtain the precious TD Material.

name: Misfortune on a Workday
description: Constant cries for help persist from the Exiles camp. Defeat the Exiles and rescue the caller from the camp.

name: Lost Ranger
description: Mrs. Jué is worried about Guhong, who regularly visits the elderly but hasn't shown up for a few days. Help her find him.

name: De-Hoochief
description: You encountered an anxious researcher, who requests your help to fight off the Hoochiefs.

name: A Quest of Wits - I
description: You meet a strange dual in the Dim Forest. They seem to have peculiar questions for you. Answer their questions correctly, and you might receive some rewards.

name: A Quest of Wits - II
description: You meet a strange dual in the Dim Forest. They seem to have peculiar questions for you. Answer their questions correctly, and you might receive some rewards.

name: A Quest of Wits - III
description: You meet a strange dual in the Dim Forest. They seem to have peculiar questions for you. Answer their questions correctly, and you might receive some rewards.

name: Investigate the Theft of Camp Supplies
description: Find out the whereabouts of the camp supplies

name: Save the World? Save the Cat!
description: The cat of the restaurant owner Xiaoju has not returned. Please help find the naughty cat and bring it back to its owner.

name: Messenger
description: Patroller Chuyi in the Dim Forest would like your help delivering a letter.

name: Shooting Party
description: You've received an invitation to a peculiar shooting party, seemingly related to the damaged robot in Settle Range. Go check it out.

name: Secret Investigation
description: The Patrollers near the Fireflies Sea seems to be in trouble. Learn about the situation before things get serious.

name: No Response Tonight
description: You've picked up a recording. The wind is howling in your ears, carrying the whispers. Perhaps, the robot nearby holds the key to unravel the continuation of the story.

name: A Free Meal?
description: Defeat Tacet Discords for rewards? Talk about a real free meal! Join Patroller Minghu, apply and secure your spot!

name: Time to Study
description: Jiu is supposed to be at the academy, but he appears troubled by something. Check out what happened to him.

name: Pedestal Device
description: Some strange pedestals in the wild pique Researcher Qinggong's interest and he wants your help over this issue.

name: Repair the Lighthouse at the Wuming Bay
description: The lighthouse at the Wuming Bay has lost power. Try to restore its power!

name: Repair the lighthouse in Desorock Highland
description: Tacet Discords threaten the engineer on her way to the lighthouse. Provide her with escort.

name: Hero of the Leap
description: Owing to Dashbon's great efforts, you learned of the legends of the Hero of the Leap. Follow his guidance and conquer the Overdash challenge and claim the title of Overdash Master!

name: Moon Shall Be My Guest
description: You meet Xiangli Yao again under the Wishing Tree. Yet, this time you share a walk not for others' wishes but for the moon's glory and the bustling lives of people.

name: Chasing the Moon's Glory
description: Not far away from Yumyum Haven, you meet Zhezhi, who is troubled by a lack of inspiration for her paintings. Ask her about it.

name: Kaleidoscope of Hongzhen
description: Xunjing, an editor for "Wutherium Geographic", is seeking a photographer. According to him, this is related to an existential crisis in his career...

name: Spring Adventures
description: Bing'ge has been scorched for his work recently. He needs someone who can help.

name: The Last Knight
description:
In Egla Town, you hear legends of the "Night Reveries" and a "Mad Knight." You decide to investigate these stories.

<color=highlight>Hidden rewards can be found in this area.</color>

name: Boundary of Deduction
description: At the entrance to a sealed room on the lower level, a malfunctioning robot keeps repeating fragmented instructions. Communicate with it to uncover the hidden story concealed within this room.

name: Skyward Voyage
description: An old captain named Davide is preparing for the last voyage of his life. But this time, his sights are set on something above the seas...

name: Yhoran's Tactical Trial
description:
Yhoran, a member of the Black Shores Emergency Response Team, is currently testing new strategies against Tacet Discords. Defeat the targets and meet the special challenge goals to earn extra rewards prepared by Yhoran.
"When you're prepared, the Reaper will not come."

name: Data Overdash
description: The Black Shores' researcher is waiting for you to test out her new ideas.

name: Message in a Bottle
description: If you come across a message in a bottle, don't hesitate to check it out. Who knows, it might be one with precious dreams and hopes inside...

name: Go Get Some Fish
description: It's fish-hunting time!

name: Every Flavor Bell-less Crab Challenge
description: When you take the bell off the Bell Crab, do you steam it, roast it, or... turn it into something special?

name: Hooked on Trouble
description: You may catch more than just fish when out at sea...

name: Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Rainbow
description: You run into Lenore, an acolyte of the Order, standing next to an Aria Mummer. She seems to be in trouble...

name: The Best Audience
description: Lorenzo from Egla Town seems in need of help.

name: Treasures in the Painting
description: Some part of the painted tower is glowing.

name: Should the Shooting Stars Blaze
description: You find a mysterious "light spark." Follow this little spark, and you may witness the shooting stars blaze.

name: Plushie Squad's Clean Return
description: After a long journey, the plushie squad is a mess… Let's help them freshen up and get sparkling clean again.

name: Duel of Destiny
description: Two legendary Gladiators are about to face their destined duel atop the tower. Sulpicia asks you to learn the story behind it…

name: Samousas's Treasure
description: Samousas stash was washed downstream. To fulfill his childhood dream, he asks you to retrieve the lost box.

name: Fantastic Ta-das and Where to Find Them
description: By the cliff's edge, a peculiar girl draws your attention. She seems to be attempting some sort of challenge.

name: Walk the Path of the Dragon
description: Jocaresa asked for your help collecting Remnant Energy crystals from the dragon bones. She claims this could grant you the power of an ancient dragon.

name: May Applause Greet You
description: It seems like the nearby hunting camp was attacked. Go check it out.

name: Dream of A Rusted Sword: Part I
description: In a valley scarred by the Dark Tide, an old Gladiator silently awaits his destiny. Like an ancient, rusted sword, he dreams of past glories.

name: Dream of A Rusted Sword: Part II
description: In a valley scarred by the Dark Tide, an old Gladiator silently awaits his destiny. Like an ancient, rusted sword, he dreams of past glories.

name: Dream of A Rusted Sword: Finale
description: One departs in the dream. Many return from the dream.

name: Help Cherry hand out the tonic
description: Help Cherry hand out the tonic to those in need

name: No. 1 Biker
description: You've caught the attention of a particularly perceptive Terminal assistant. He claims there exists a race track where no one has ever crossed the finish line...

name: The Comfort of Home
description: Rakosan, who's been fully devoted to the reconstruction of Spacetrek Observatory, finds himself with a visitor today...

name: The Whisper of Memories
description: A robot active on the suspension platform is emitting strange sounds…

name: Catch the Winds
description: A strange Royan merchant arrives near the Relay Station, unusually warm and eager to involve you in an odd transaction…

name: Catch the Winds
description: A strange Royan merchant arrives near the Relay Station, unusually warm and eager to involve you in an odd transaction…

name: Catch the Winds
description: A strange Royan merchant arrives near the Relay Station, unusually warm and eager to involve you in an odd transaction…

name: Dark Duel Legends: Part I
description: Rumor has it that at midnight, in the station, people engage in “Dark Duels,” battles waged with souls and lives. You decide to investigate the rumor yourself…

name: Pulses of the Plains
description: Zahira, one of the "Startorch's Seven Great Mysteries," appears to be "negotiating" with a researcher. Her animated hand gestures give no clue whether she's casting a spell or haggling in some mysterious trade…

name: Squeezy not Smiley
description: Abby wants to try Startorch Academy's cafeteria dishes.

name: Where Starry Seas Endure II
description: Harriet seems troubled by something. Speak with her and learn what it's about.

name: Hidden Childhood
description: You come across kids playing hide-and-seek. They promise you their “treasure” if you can find all of them within the time limit…

name: A Night of Shimmering Stars
description: You helped a student named Ang recover her stargazing guide. To her, it's more than just a booklet; it carries the weight of a promise she shared with her friends…

name: Welcome to the Fan Club
description: You meet an enthusiastic student named Bjarki. Thanks to his recommendations, you find yourself intrigued by all the different "fan clubs" across the Academy…

name: Ultimate Challenge
description: At the Research Institute, you encounter two troubled researchers. They seem to be wrestling with a difficult problem…

name: Final Reverberation II
description: You hand the “treasure” taken from the kids to I.R.I.S. The system analysis reveals it's connected to a missing professor. You decide to look deeper.

name: Urban Legend: The Tale Teller
description: The one who tells urban legends has mysteriously disappeared. Perhaps those who gaze long into anomalies find the anomalies gazing back, and may one day be devoured by them, becoming part of the anomaly itself... And you, tugging at the loose threads, begin to sense the secret behind it all...

name: Medical Supplies
description: The supply-starved camp is in desperate need of medical supplies…

name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self
description: Near the infirmary, you spot a student who has posted a wanted notice on himself...

name: Fracture the Frozen Mirror
description: You encounter an unusual robot who seems to hold a rather unique view of the truth behind this world...

name: Where to Watch the Fireworks Show?
description: In the Academy, you come across a student who seems to be having trouble with a TARD-E Unit…

name: A Snowbound Order from Cobalt Blue
description: A vague order of unknown origin keeps appearing in the ordering system again and again. It feels as though someone on the other end is waiting for a response or perhaps it's only a belated echo. As the season of the melting snowline returns, will you trace the origin of this order and discover where it truly belongs?
